title: cryptostylis longifolia
intro: Cryptostylis longifolia, also known as the greenhood orchid, is a species of orchid native to Australia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Cryptostylis longifolia include infusions and tinctures made from its roots and leaves, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
